_comment: Waypoints are Google Maps forcing points — intermediate coords that make Maps take a specific route it would not suggest naturally. holmdel_crawfords forces GSP Exit 116 (free) instead of default Exit 117 ($0.79 each way); include it on any route to save that ramp cost.

holmdel_crawfords.name: Crawfords Corner Rd / Holmdel
holmdel_crawfords.note: Forces GSP Exit 116 (no toll). Omitting uses Exit 117 and adds gsp_holmdel_ramp ($0.79).

toHome.name: Direct — Turnpike 16W
toHome.description: Google Maps natural route via NJ-3 east to Turnpike 16W, Exit 11 to GSP south

toHome.name: Turnpike 16E (Seaview)
toHome.description: Forced on-ramp at Seaview Dr, Secaucus onto Turnpike Eastern Spur

toHome.name: Turnpike 16E (Eastern Spur)
toHome.description: Forced on-ramp directly at NJ Turnpike Eastern Spur, Secaucus

waypoints.name: Eastern Spur, Secaucus
waypoints.address: NJ Turnpike Eastern Spur, Secaucus, NJ 07096

toHome.name: All-GSP
toHome.description: Forced local roads via Grant Ave/Nutley to GSP southbound on-ramp at Bloomfield, then GSP all the way south. Grant Ave is required — it only makes sense paired with the Bloomfield on-ramp.

toWork.name: Direct — Turnpike 16W
toWork.description: Google Maps natural route: GSP north to Exit 11, Turnpike to 16W, NJ-3 west to work

toWork.name: All-GSP
toWork.description: Forced all-GSP route north: Exit 116/117 → Union barrier → Bloomfield exit → local to work

toWork.name: I-280 / Essex Freeway
toWork.description: Forced route via I-280 through Newark — avoids Parkway entirely
